name: Chocolate Almond Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 10-inch spring-form pan with vegetable oil and line with greased wax paper.
2. Chop nuts and dates. Process chocolate in a food processor or grate it on the large side of a food grater.
3. In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add egg yolks one at a time.
4. Fold in nuts, dates, and chocolate pieces.
5. In another bowl, whip the egg whites until they form soft peaks. Fold all but 1/2 cup into the butter mixture.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 40-50 minutes at 375°F (190°C), or until set.
7. Let cool for 15-20 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
8. Melt 3 oz. white or dark chocolate and pour over the cooled cake. Refrigerate for at least two hours.
9. Cut with a hot knife. Serve with fresh cream and maybe rose petals.
